race.comment: SOLAR CHANT (7) bolted in first-up over this trip at Ascot before flying late as an odds-on pop at York last start. This is tougher than her latest effort, though her ratings stack up and Chris Parnham hops on board. Needs some luck but can make her presence felt third-up. GREAT PROMISE (6) resumed in good order when racing in a CL3 over this trip at Ascot. She'll be better for that effort and her trials leading in were very good. Can get across from the tricky barrier and give herself every chance. SNIPER'S SON (4) gets the blinkers on first time today coming back in trip and he won't be far away. FAVOURITE SONGS (5) can resume on a positive note.
